build_system: pnpm 10.28.1 + turbo, tsc for individual packages
test_framework: vitest with globals: true, coverage via v8
verification_instructions: 1. pnpm install 2. pnpm turbo typecheck --filter=@quant/device-control 3. pnpm turbo test --filter=@quant/device-control 4. pnpm turbo build --filter=@quant/device-control
contribution_requirements: <=500 LOC per PR, commit message format: feat(device-control): ..., contract-first (interfaces before implementations), tests required

key_patterns.package_structure: Each package has package.json (private, type=module, main/types point to src/index.ts), tsconfig.json extends ../../tsconfig.json, vitest.config.ts optional (root config applies)
key_patterns.scripts: build: tsc, typecheck: tsc --noEmit, test: vitest run, lint: eslint .
key_patterns.dependencies: workspace deps use 'workspace:*', zod for schemas, @types/node devDep
key_patterns.exports: Barrel exports via src/index.ts with .js extensions in imports
key_patterns.tests: Tests in src/__tests__/, use vitest describe/it/expect/beforeEach, import from parent paths with .js extension
key_patterns.types: Types in src/types.ts, exported via index.ts, use interfaces/type aliases extensively
key_patterns.audit_pattern: Append-only log array, log() method with schema validation, getHistory/getByX query methods, clear() for testing
key_patterns.permission_tiers: AgentActionTier enum: Tier0_ReadOnly(0) through Tier4_Admin(4) in @quant/agent-runtime

directory_structure: Root: apps/, packages/, services/, infra/, docs/, scripts/, e2e/. Packages each have: src/ (with __tests__/), package.json, tsconfig.json. Root has vitest.config.ts, turbo.json, pnpm-workspace.yaml.
